meaning: n.<美>[律]宣誓书,(经陈诉者宣誓在法律上可采作证据的)书面陈述
examples: In his sworn affidavit, Roche outlined a history of actions against him by the church.
"You tried to cut my head off you're going to jail" the man screamed the affidavit notes.
